title: drypetes mildbraedii
intro: Drypetes mildbraedii, also known as the African or African boxwood, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Drypetes mildbraedii include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, and it can also be used as a topical treatment for skin conditions.
